display.purpose: Hero figures only — balance amounts, stat tile totals, the Insights score. Never body copy.

title.purpose: Page-level H2 headers via .font-title. Brunson.ttf is loaded but not yet wired to this role.

shadows.name: floating-chrome
shadows.purpose: Bottom nav pill and similar floating glass surfaces.

shadows.name: dropdown
shadows.purpose: Profile menu and popups floating furthest above the page.

shadows.name: glass-button
shadows.purpose: Avatar button and small floating circular controls.

shadows.name: toggle-knob
shadows.purpose: Segmented toggle track and sliding knob — tactile inset highlight.

motion.name: ease-nav
motion.purpose: Bottom nav shrink/expand on scroll, icon active-state transitions.

motion.name: duration-chrome
motion.purpose: Default duration for floating-chrome transitions (nav resize, background fade).

motion.name: duration-segment
motion.purpose: Balance hero segmented meter fill, staggered 30ms per segment.

components.name: Balance Zone Card
components.description: The Dashboard's hero card — total balance on the Balance Purple gradient with a segmented spend meter.
components.html:
Total Balance

$2,480.00

July 2026
components.css: .ds-card-balance { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 24px; padding: 16px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, #F5E8FF 0%, #E4C6FF 55%, #CE9CFF 100%); } .ds-blob { position: absolute; border-radius: 9999px; pointer-events: none; } .ds-blob--tl { top: -56px; right: -40px; width: 176px; height: 176px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } .ds-blob--br { bottom: -56px; left: -32px; width: 144px; height: 144px; background: rgba(176,38,255,0.12); } .ds-card-balance__row { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-balance__label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #7A0DB3; } .ds-card-balance__amount { position: relative; margin-top: 12px; font-family: Righteous, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 2.4rem; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #3B0764; } .ds-card-balance__caption { position: relative; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: rgba(59,7,100,0.55); }

components.name: Expense Zone Tile
components.description: Stat tile on the Expense Red gradient; income tile is the same shape on the Income Green gradient.
components.html:
Expenses

$860.00
components.css: .ds-tile { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 24px; padding: 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-tile--expense { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #FFEDEE 0%, #FFD3D6 55%, #FFB0B5 100%); } .ds-blob--tl-sm { top: -40px; right: -32px; width: 112px; height: 112px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } .ds-blob--br-sm { bottom: -40px; left: -24px; width: 96px; height: 96px; } .ds-blob--expense { background: rgba(255,77,77,0.12); } .ds-tile__row { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-tile__label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: rgba(127,29,29,0.65); } .ds-tile__amount { position: relative; margin-top: 12px; font-family: Righteous, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #7F1D1D; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Flow Green pill button for the strongest call to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #A8FF3E; color: #000000; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 16px; border: none; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; transition: transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #020203; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Floating liquid-glass pill nav, active icon on Insights gets a sky-tinted pill background.
components.html: ●○○○
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 9999px; backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.8); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.8); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-nav__item { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 9999px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-nav__item--active { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1); color: #020203; }

components.name: Active Badge
components.description: Flow Green selected-state chip used in menus and pickers (currency, theme).
components.css: .ds-badge-active { background: #A8FF3E; color: #000000; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 16px; }

narrative.overview: Flow! rejects the beige-and-navy finance-app default. Every functional zone of the app — Balance, Expense, Income, New Entry, Insights — owns its own saturated pastel-to-vivid gradient identity, so the interface reads like a set of charged, distinct rooms rather than one uniform dashboard. The mood is vívida, lúdica, directa (vivid, playful, direct): loud enough that a screenshot is instantly recognizable as Flow!, but never cluttered — each card carries exactly one gradient, one or two soft white "sheen" blobs, and dark, high-contrast type sitting directly on the color instead of on a neutral panel. This is a Committed-to-Full-palette color strategy: several named zone colors, each used deliberately and never mixed across zones, anchored by Flow Green (#A8FF3E) as the one color that crosses every zone — it marks primary actions, active nav state, and the lock screen, regardless of which zone the screen belongs to. The system explicitly rejects the "sad corporate finance app" aesthetic — muted grays, spreadsheet-style tables, navy-and-white bank branding, timid single-accent restraint. Warmth and energy are carried by saturated hue, not by a cream/beige body background; the base surface is a near-white, low-chroma warm neutral that exists only to make the zone gradients pop, never as the star of the page.
keyCharacteristics: Every card is a self-contained color zone: pastel-to-vivid diagonal gradient (145deg), 1-2 soft translucent white blobs for sheen, dark ink-toned text at full opacity sitting directly on the gradient.
Flow Green (#A8FF3E) is the one cross-zone constant: primary buttons, active states, the lock screen's floating unlock button.
Semantic temperature is fixed: green = income/positive, red = expense/negative, never inverted, never neutralized to gray.
Floating chrome (bottom nav, avatar, dropdowns) is liquid glass: backdrop-filter blur(24px) saturate(1.8) over a translucent card-color fill, never a flat opaque bar.
The lock screen is the system's boldest moment: four animated, heavily blurred color blobs behind a narrow floating card — an aurora mesh treatment reserved for that one screen.

rules.name: The Semantic Temperature Rule
rules.body: Green means income/positive, red means expense/negative. The exact hue can shift with a redesign; the meaning never inverts and never goes gray for "neutrality."

rules.name: The One Zone, One Color Rule
rules.body: A gradient family belongs to exactly one card type. Never borrow another zone's exact gradient to "match" a nearby card — the zone distinctness is the point.

rules.name: The Numbers-Get-Personality Rule
rules.body: Righteous is reserved for figures the user cares about (balances, totals, the AI score). Body copy, labels, and descriptions stay in Plus Jakarta Sans — display type never leaks into paragraph text.

rules.name: The Flat Zone, Floating Chrome Rule
rules.body: Content cards are flat at rest — their depth comes from color and sheen blobs, not shadow. Shadow is reserved for chrome that must visually float above content: nav, dropdowns, modals, floating buttons.

dos: Do give every new functional zone its own gradient family with a matching deep-text color — never reuse another zone's exact gradient.
Do keep Flow Green (#A8FF3E) as the one cross-zone color for primary actions and active states, paired with black text/icons.
Do use rounded-3xl (24px) for content cards and reserve rounded-full for pills, nav, and small circular controls.
Do use backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.8) for any chrome that floats above content rather than a flat opaque fill.
Do keep green = income/positive and red = expense/negative absolute; never substitute a neutral gray for either.
donts: Don't default to a cream/beige/paper body background "for warmth" — the base surface must stay a low-chroma near-white or near-black so zone gradients carry the color.
Don't put a drop shadow on a zone card at rest — depth comes from the gradient and sheen blobs, not box-shadow.
Don't invert or neutralize the income/expense color coding, even for a "calmer" variant.
Don't reuse the four-blob "aurora" treatment outside the lock screen — its rarity is what makes it read as an event.
Don't let Righteous leak into body copy, or Plus Jakarta Sans carry a hero balance figure.
